hooks.command: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/session-init.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/scout-block.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/privacy-block.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/build-gate-hook.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/context-reminder.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/subagent-dispatch.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/session-metrics.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/lesson-capture.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/notifications/notify.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true
